real_interview.content: <synch>

IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
yes
okay_confirm (okay)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
pretty good
thats_good (that's good)
where_originally (where are you from originally)
i grew up in boston
really (really)
when_LA (when did you move to l_a)
about thirty years ago
long_time (that's a long time)
yep
often_backB (how often do you go back to your hometown)
not too often
maybe once a year sometimes less
compares_LA (how does it compare to l_a)
oh i love living in l_a i don't ever wanna live anywhere else
why_LA (why did you move to l_a)
well i came out here to go to college and i wanted to be far away from my parents and
the weather was good and
that's part of it
okay_confirm (okay)
adapted_LA (how easy was it for you to get used to living in l_a)
uh very easy
well maybe somewhat easy the beginning the first few weeks was really hard
to just be in a new environment and to be away from everybody i knew but after a few weeks it was great
mhm (mhm)
study (what did you study at school)
broadcast journalism
sounds_interesting (that sounds interesting)
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
well it's something i'd wanted to do since i was twelve
and everything i did from the time i was twelve until i went to college was sort of in pursuit of that dream
still_working_on_X (are you still working in that)
no <laughter>
why2 (why)
well it's kind of a long story but i got laid off from my first job when i was
in my twenties and
it just
once i had done that work i realized that's not really what i wanted to do it was too
cut-throat of a business and it just really wasn't suited for me it didn't make me happy
yeah_downer (yeah)
good_job (it can be tough to find a good job these days)
yep <sigh>
dream_job (what's your dream job)
my dream job is working with football players and helping them recover from concussions and other injuries
nice (nice)
difficult (how hard is that)
<deep breath> well the work itself is not very hard i'm very good at what i do the hard part is finding the right people and making the connections to work with them
see_mean (i see what you mean)
it
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
i used to i don't travel so much right now
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
i love seeing different places and different things like i love going to places that are not like
where i'm from
uh_huh (uh huh)
travel_trips (i'd love to hear about one of your trips)
my favorite trip is i went to australia for my thirtieth birthday
wow (wow)
'cause i wanted to lose my thirtieth birthday as i crossed the international date line
wild_laughter3 ((laughter))
and i went to this really small <sigh> place up on the
uh west coast of australia called shark's bay where native dolphins live and swim
and is very isolated for the most part and i got to be there for a whole week and just really just pretty much by myself
with all these wild dolphins and they come and they swim with you
and it's amazing just a beautiful beautiful spot in the world
awesome (awesome)
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
more shy <sigh>
why2 (why)
<deep breath> why <sigh> hmm that's a good question um
partly the first thing i think of is 'cause i've always been that way
but maybe that's an excuse i don't know um
<deep breath>
i just prefer to be quiet and i'd rather be with fewer people than lots of people
so <sigh>
okay_confirm (okay)
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
<deep breath>
i watch t_v <sigh> a lot
or that's probably not the best alternative but it is something i do
and i also walk on the beach 'cause i live close to the beach so that's one of my favorite things to relax
uh_huh (uh huh)
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
<deep breath> pretty good
it depends on the situation but most of the time i'm pretty good
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
<deep breath> um i don't think i tend to argue with people i think i just get mad about situations
but not at people directly <sigh>
mm (mm)
okay_confirm (okay)
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
<sigh> hmm <sigh>
i don't know if i feel guilty about anything at the moment
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
not sure i have one at the moment
okay_confirm (okay)
mad_makeyou (what are some things that make you really mad)
<deep breath> noise other people's noise makes me really mad
um i live across the street from a bar and these people are so rude and obnoxious and
not considerate
about their neighbors that that just makes me really mad <sigh>
that_sucks (that sucks)
yeah <sigh>
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
hmm <sigh>
well the only one that comes to mind off the top of my head is is when i bought my condo
it felt like a really hard decision at the time
you know i didn't know that i could do it i didn't wasn't sure if i had the money to do it
um so that felt like a really difficult decision but in hindsight course it turned out to be a great decision
but at the time it was really difficult to do that
yeah3 (yeah)
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
pretty easy i sleep pretty well <sigh>
thats_good (that's good)
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
<deep breath> for the most part good i'm i'm just really worried about money <sigh> at the moment so that's my biggest so i can't say that i'm like great
but i it's 'cause i am worried but you know i'm also confident that things are gonna work out
thats_good (that's good)
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
nope <sigh>
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
nope
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
<sigh>
hmm <sigh>
i don't know i can't remember
i mean i don't feel
super happy all the time but i don't feel unhappy either sort of like just uh
even
keel
Ellie17Dec2012_10 (tell me about something you did recently that you really enjoyed)
well i got to go to the um
my friends work at the motion picture academy so i get to see all the xxx oscar-nominated movies
scrubbed_entry
she was there one night so uh i really enjoyed catching up with her and
seeing her again so that was very pleasant <sigh>
nice (nice)
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
<deep breath> i think
they would say um reliable
and
loyal <sigh>
and
considerate and thoughtful
regret (is there anything you regret)
<deep breath> no <sigh> i really have worked hard on that
i think
there are lots of things maybe i would do differently but there's nothing that really i regret
like_what (like what)
um
<deep breath> well i just think that there are things
that
um <sigh>
like it's not worth wasting the energy
to think about things that i regret
so i don't have a lot of xxx regrets about things
okay_confirm (okay)
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
<deep breath> oh that's a good question <sigh> um <sigh> don't worry about the small stuff
and save more money <laughter>
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
like
<deep breath>
well there's uh you know the normal things like i'd lose more weight and i would um
uh <sigh>
think be a little more fearless maybe <sigh>
be a little more bold
mhm (mhm)
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
i don't think i have any the of those
okay_confirm (okay)
ideal_weekendC (tell me how you spend your ideal weekend)
<deep breath> well i'm i am self-employed so i work all the time <laughter> so my ideal weekend is having lots of clients
um
that's something i enjoy
um
so that would that would be ideal at this point my weekends if i were really busy
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
<deep breath> that i've really been able to take care of myself and that
you know i've done pretty much everything that i've said that i've wanted to do
i've done that
and i don't and i don't have regrets about things there's nothing really that
eh
is un feels undone
in my life sure there's plenty of things i still wanna do
um but
i feel like i've done what i said i was gonna do
thats_great (that's great)
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
<deep breath> yeah <sigh> that's not so great well it's okay um both my parents are deceased and i have a sister and a brother
um
i feel closer to my brother than my sister but um
they both live on the east coast and i live in l_a
um and then i have <ha> my sister has two girls
so i feel very close to my nieces although we don't talk as much as we used to 'cause they're teenagers so
they have other things on their mind
wild_laughter5 ((laughter))
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
<deep breath> um probably my teacher
a person i learned my holistic body work from
i really like to <sigh>
model my work and my way of being after him
like he's a a good role model
for me the way he holds his work and the way he lives his life
good_hear (that's so good to hear)
how_close (how close are you to them)
<deep breath> um we're pretty close we're not you know best of friends but i do i know that i can call him any time i need him
Ellie17Dec2012_09 (what are some things that usually put you in a good mood)
um <sigh> put me in a good mood <sigh>
usually being with my friends or going out to dinner
or um <sigh>
yeah just spending time with my friends
uh_huh (uh huh)
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
okay
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
thanks <sigh>
bye (goodbye)
bye
